release_body_consistency.body_summary: Runtime replay, CI checks, release proof automation, adapter events, evaluator outputs, and replay packets are evidence-producing systems, not authorities.

next_phase_declaration.actual: M10 — Decision Proof Sealing Boundary and External Integration Readiness

not_authority_statement: Release proof automation may prepare auditable release evidence but must not approve, block, classify, roll back, publish releases, seal Decision Proof, close audits, or make final governance judgments.
sovereignty_statement: AAOS retains purpose and business intent, risk appetite, approval doctrine, identity trust chain, policy authority, decision router logic, escalation semantics, fail-closed policy, rollback policy, final risk classification, Decision Proof sealing logic, audit final judgment, and final governance authority.
